title: Former Union Minister and senior Congress leader K.P. Unnikrishnan no more
content:
K.P. Unnikrishnan, a prominent political figure, has passed away.
*   He was a Former Union Minister, indicating a significant role in the Indian government.
*   Unnikrishnan was also recognized as a senior leader within the Congress party.

title: Modi govt's silence on Khamenei assassination not neutral but abdication: Sonia Gandhi
content:
Sonia Gandhi criticized the Modi government for its silence regarding the assassination of Khamenei.
*   She argued that this silence was not a neutral position.
*   Instead, Gandhi characterized the government's inaction as an "abdication."

title: Preparations started for the by-election in Tripura Assembly seat
content:
Preparations have officially commenced.
*   These preparations are for an upcoming by-election.
*   The by-election will be held in a Tripura Assembly seat.

title: CM urges Union govt.to grant approvalfor archaeological excavations in State
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Chief Minister (CM) has urged the Union Government.
*   The request is to grant approval.
*   This approval is for archaeological excavations within the state.

title: Chhattisgarh private schools face off with government over RTE reimbursement, announce ‘non-cooperation’
content:
**Conflict:** Private schools in Chhattisgarh are in a dispute with the state government.
*   **Reason:** The disagreement is over outstanding or insufficient reimbursement for expenses related to the Right to Education (RTE) Act.
*   **Action:** The schools have declared a 'non-cooperation' stance against the government as a result.

title: Tamil got wide global recognition under Modi government, says C.P. Radhakrishnan
content:
C.P. Radhakrishnan asserts that Tamil language and culture has achieved significant global recognition.
*   This increased global prominence for Tamil is attributed to the current Modi government's period and efforts.
*   The statement highlights a specific achievement or focus of the Modi administration regarding Tamil's international standing.

title: Senior executive of a private hospital in Bengaluru booked for rape
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A senior executive has been booked for rape.
*   The individual is associated with a private hospital.
*   The incident and booking occurred in Bengaluru.

title: Madras High Court sets aside order to extend Thalikku Thangam scheme to those who earn up to ₹12,000 a month
content:
The Madras High Court has set aside a previous order.
*   This order aimed to extend the scope of the "Thalikku Thangam" scheme.
*   The proposed extension would have included beneficiaries earning up to ₹12,000 a month.

title: Bank retirees stage dharna, seek revision of pensions
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Bank retirees are staging a dharna (sit-in protest).
*   Their primary demand is for a revision of their pensions.
*   The protest aims to secure updated or improved pension benefits.

title: Andhra Pradesh sees 4.4% drop in crimes against women, says Home Minister
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Andhra Pradesh has recorded a drop in crimes against women.
*   The reported reduction in such cases is 4.4%.
*   This positive trend was announced by the Home Minister.
